headline_seed: OpenAI Trial Live Updates: Jury Rejects Elon Musk's Claim in Unanimous Verdict - The New York Times
draft_text:
A federal jury in Oakland found Sam Altman and OpenAI not liable on all claims Monday — deliberating less than two hours.

NBC News and CNBC report the verdict turned on the statute of limitations: Musk waited too long to sue.

And that's the mews.
